commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Kubernetes docs and a deployment manifest `NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=1536` default to reduce OOM kills under pod memory limits.

PR surface: Docs +10, Other +6. Total +16 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: current Node source shows cgroup-aware V8 default configuration, contradicting the new docs/manifest wording. The original Kubernetes OOM report is only contributor-reported and was not independently reproduced in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor-side real behavior proof plus maintainer review of the Kubernetes deployment-default tradeoff; it should not enter an automated repair lane while proof is missing.
